title: Marbella Boat Rental Birthday Party: Prices, Boats & Tips for 2026
html:
Planning a birthday party on the water in Marbella? Renting a motor yacht or catamaran from Puerto Banús lets you celebrate with a dozen friends while cruising the Costa del Sol. A half-day charter for a group of ten typically starts around EUR 1,200. BoatHire24, a worldwide marketplace, connects you with verified boats and owners, so you can hire a boat with confidence.

Where to set off in Marbella

Marbella’s coastline is dotted with excellent departure points. The most famous is Puerto Banús, a glamorous marina lined with superyachts and designer boutiques. For a quieter start, consider Marbella Marina (Puerto Deportivo de Marbella), which is closer to the old town. Other options include Puerto de la Duquesa in Manilva to the west, and Puerto José Banús (the original fishing port). You might also weigh anchor in Marbella Bay itself, or cruise east towards Cabo Pino and Calahonda. Many skippers recommend heading to Isla de las Palomas for a swim stop.

Which boat to rent

Choosing the right boat depends on your guest list and desired vibe. Here are four popular options for a birthday party in Marbella.

  1. Motor yacht, Best for a sleek, fast party with up to 12 guests. A 50-60 foot yacht like the Azimut 58 for hire includes a flybridge, saloon, and swim platform. From EUR 2,000 for a half-day.
  2. Catamaran, Stable and spacious, ideal for groups up to 15. Lagoon 44 or similar offers two hulls of deck space and a trampoline. From EUR 2,500 for a full-day charter.
  3. Sports boat, Perfect for a younger crowd, seating 6-8 people. Axopar 37 or similar for watersports and high-speed cruising. From EUR 900 for a half-day.
  4. Sunseeker Predator, A head-turning open yacht for up to 10 guests, ideal for a stylish evening cruise. From EUR 3,000 for a half-day.

How much does it cost to rent a boat for a birthday party in Marbella?

Costs vary widely: expect EUR 900 to EUR 5,000 for a private half-day charter, depending on the boat size and season. Shared tours are cheaper at around EUR 80 per person for a 4-hour outing. Fuel is usually extra: budget EUR 200-400 for a half-day on a motor yacht. Many operators include a skipper and basic catering; premium packages add a host or DJ. Use the boat search to filter by price, capacity, and amenities.

  • Shared tour: EUR 80-120 per person for 4 hours
  • Small motorboat half-day (up to 8 guests): EUR 900-1,500
  • Catamaran full-day (up to 15 guests): EUR 2,500-4,000
  • Crewed motor yacht (up to 12 guests): EUR 2,000-5,000 for half-day

To compare verified boats and their exact prices, visit the boat search on BoatHire24. You can filter by date, capacity, and party equipment such as sound systems.

Do you need a licence to rent a boat in Marbella?

No licence is required if you charter a skippered boat, which is standard for birthday parties. For bareboat rentals, Spanish law requires a valid recreational boating licence (such as the Patrón de Navegación Básica or PNB). The operator will confirm the exact requirements when you book; most party rentals include a professional skipper, so you can simply relax.

Local tip: book your birthday charter for June, July, August, or September to enjoy the warmest sea temperatures and the Poniente wind keeping the sea calm. For fewer crowds, choose late May or early October.

At a glance

  • Price band: EUR 900 to EUR 5,000 for private half-day charter
  • Peak months: June to September
  • Typical trip length: 4 or 8 hours
  • Maximum capacity: 12-15 guests on most party boats
  • Currency: EUR
  • Licence: Usually not needed (skipper included)

Questions about boat rental for a birthday party in Marbella

Can we bring our own food and drink on board?

Most charter companies allow you to bring your own catering, though some offer catering packages with local Spanish cuisine.

What happens if the weather is bad on the day of my party?

The skipper will decide whether it is safe to sail; if conditions are dangerous, you can reschedule or receive a full refund, as stated in the booking policy.

Is there parking near Puerto Banús for party guests?

Yes, large public car parks are available within a 5-minute walk of the marina, though they fill quickly in summer.

How far can we cruise in a half-day trip?

A half-day charter typically covers 10-15 nautical miles, allowing stops near Cabo Pino or Isla de las Palomas.

The best way to secure your ideal boat for a birthday party is to compare verified listings on BoatHire24. If you own a boat in Marbella, you can also rent out your boat to earn extra income from the booming tourism season in 2026.

Written by the BoatHire24 team, who book and list verified boats in Marbella and hundreds of destinations worldwide.
